TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_ms'utux_tnuxan, title = ms'utux_tnuxan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/ms'utux_tnuxan} }

S.FORM: ms'utux tnuxan ita Tayal heya ga waya thoyay mhenas pcpung nku gaga m'likuy ru m'knrin nku mykyas ru mkrakis lga, thoyay pkkita la ru s'aras naha mbkis na gluw utux gaga, yaba yaya ru gluw utux sali, mosa smiye nku sali na krakis galan naha ina. kya ku waya mble pkkayan nku sa'ing sali na mbkis ru yaba yaya lga, thoyay naha spgluw gaga nku ps'onun naha mkkita nku mrkysa ru krakis ga tgiwan mosa pcrux utux sali. kwara yaw hani ga yaca san maha ms'utux tnuxan.

ms'utux tnuxan ita Tayal heya ga waya thoyay mhenas pcpung nku gaga m'likuy ru m'knrin nku mykyas ru mkrakis lga, thoyay pkkita la ru s'aras naha mbkis na gluw utux gaga, yaba yaya ru gluw utux sali, mosa smiye nku sali na krakis galan naha ina. kya ku waya mble pkkayan nku sa'ing sali na mbkis ru yaba yaya lga, thoyay naha spgluw gaga nku ps'onun naha mkkita nku mrkysa ru krakis ga tgiwan mosa pcrux utux sali. kwara yaw hani ga yaca san maha ms'utux tnuxan.
S.PHON: ms~ɕʔutux tnuxan ita tajal ħeja ɣa waja tħojaj mħenas~ɕ pʦ~ʨpuŋ nku ɣaɣa mʔlikuj ru mʔknrin nku mjkjas~ɕ ru mkrakis~ɕ lɣa, tħojaj pkkita la ru s~ɕʔaras~ɕ naħa mβkis~ɕ na ɣluw utux ɣaɣa, jaβa jaja ru ɣluw utux s~ɕali, mos~ɕa s~ɕmije nku s~ɕali na krakis~ɕ ɣalan naħa ina. kja ku waja mβle pkkajan nku s~ɕaʔiŋ s~ɕali na mβkis~ɕ ru jaβa jaja lɣa, tħojaj naħa s~ɕpɣluw ɣaɣa nku ps~ɕʔonun naħa mkkita nku mrkjs~ɕa ru krakis~ɕ ɣa tɣiwan mos~ɕa pʦ~ʨrux utux s~ɕali. kwara jaw ħani ɣa jaʦ~ʨa s~ɕan maħa ms~ɕʔutux tnuxan.
